name: Your Name Here
title: Creative Professional
bio: Designer, developer, and maker — I build things that look sharp, work smoothly, and tell a story worth remembering. Swap this for yours.
aboutLong: A versatile creative who moves fluidly between disciplines — whether that means crafting a brand identity from scratch, writing clean production code, modeling a 3D environment, or cutting a film that actually makes people feel something. The common thread is craft: doing the work well enough that the process disappears and only the result remains. Replace this with your own story.
